init.title: Fritz!Box DSL Modem
init.description: Optional: Fritz!Box credentials for DSL statistics and 24h speed chart. Leave empty to disable.

data_description.fritzbox_host: IP address of the Fritz!Box modem (e.g. 172.16.1.254)

user.title: Connect to OpenWrt Router
user.description: Enter the connection details for your OpenWrt router. The router must have rpcd and uhttpd running.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the router (e.g. 192.168.1.1)

reauth_rpcd_setup.title: rpcd Not Responding on {host}
reauth_rpcd_setup.description:
The router **{host}** is blocking authentication — rpcd may not be configured.

SSH into the router and run:

`opkg update && opkg install rpcd rpcd-mod-rpcsys && uci set rpcd.@rpcd[0].socket='/var/run/ubus/ubus.sock' && uci set rpcd.@rpcd[0].timeout=30 && uci commit rpcd && service rpcd restart`

Then click **Submit** to retry.

reauth_cannot_connect.title: Router Unreachable: {host}
reauth_cannot_connect.description:
Cannot reach **{host}**. Make sure the router is powered on and reachable on the network.

Click **Submit** to retry.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with OpenWrt Router
reauth_confirm.description: The credentials for **{host}** (user: {username}) are no longer valid. Please enter the new password.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the router. Check the host and port and ensure the router is reachable.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the username and password.
error.invalid_host: Invalid host address. Use a valid IP or hostname.
error.timeout: Connection timed out. The router may be unreachable or overloaded.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
error.rpcd_setup_required: rpcd is not configured on this router. SSH into the router and run: opkg update && opkg install rpcd rpcd-mod-rpcsys && uci set rpcd.@rpcd[0].socket='/var/run/ubus/ubus.sock' && uci set rpcd.@rpcd[0].timeout=30 && uci commit rpcd && service rpcd restart
